2604.24038.title: AgentPulse: A Continuous Multi-Signal Framework for Evaluating AI Agents in Deployment
2604.24038.paper_summary: Static benchmarks measure what AI agents can do at a fixed point in time but not how they are adopted, maintained, or experienced in deployment. We introduce AgentPulse, a continuous evaluation framework scoring 50 agents across 10 workload categories along four factors (Benchmark Performance, Adoption Signals, Community Sentiment, and Ecosystem Health) aggregated from 18 real-time signals across GitHub, package registries, IDE marketplaces, social platforms, and benchmark leaderboards. Three analyses ground the framework. The four factors capture largely complementary information (n=50; $ρ_{\max}=0.61$ for Adoption-Ecosystem, all others $|ρ| \leq 0.37$). A circularity-controlled test (n=35) shows the Benchmark+Sentiment sub-composite, which contains no GitHub-derived signals, predicts external adoption proxies it does not aggregate: GitHub stars ($ρ_s=0.52$, $p<0.01$) and Stack Overflow question volume ($ρ_s=0.49$, $p<0.01$), with VS Code installs ($ρ_s=0.44$, $p<0.05$) reported as illustrative given that only 11 of 35 agents have non-zero installs. On the n=11 subset with published SWE-bench scores, composite and benchmark-only rankings are nearly uncorrelated ($ρ_s=0.25$; 9 of 11 agents shift by at least 2 ranks), driven by a strong negative Adoption-Capability correlation among closed-source high-capability agents within this subset. This is precisely why we rest the framework's validity claim on the broader n=35 test rather than the SWE-bench overlap. AgentPulse surfaces deployment signal absent from benchmarks; it is a methodology, not a ground-truth ranking. The framework, all collected signals, scoring outputs, and evaluation harness are released under CC BY 4.0.
2604.24038.paper_summary_zh: 靜態基準測試衡量 AI 代理在固定時間點的能力，但無法評估它們在部署中的採用、維護或體驗。我們介紹了 AgentPulse，一個持續評估框架，對 50 個代理在 10 個工作負載類別中進行評分，並根據來自 GitHub、套件註冊表、IDE 市場、社交平台和基準排行榜的 18 個實時信號，沿著四個因素（基準性能、採用信號、社群情感和生態系統健康）進行聚合。三項分析為該框架提供了基礎。這四個因素捕捉了大部分互補的信息（n=50；$ρ_{\max}=0.61$ 對於採用-生態系統，其他均為 $|ρ| \leq 0.37$）。一項控制循環性的測試（n=35）顯示，基準+情感子綜合體，該子綜合體不包含任何來自 GitHub 的信號，預測了它未聚合的外部採用代理：GitHub 星標 ($ρ_s=0.52$, $p<0.01$) 和 Stack Overflow 問題數量 ($ρ_s=0.49$, $p<0.01$)，而 VS Code 安裝量 ($ρ_s=0.44$, $p<0.05$) 被報告為說明性，因為在 35 個代理中只有 11 個擁有非零安裝。在 n=11 的子集上，已發佈的 SWE-bench 分數中，綜合排名和僅基準排名幾乎不相關 ($ρ_s=0.25$；11 個代理中有 9 個的排名至少變動 2 位)，這是由於在這個子集中的閉源高能力代理之間存在強烈的負採用-能力相關性。這正是為什麼我們將框架的有效性主張建立在更廣泛的 n=35 測試上，而不是 SWE-bench 的重疊。AgentPulse 顯示了基準中缺失的部署信號；這是一種方法論，而不是一個真實的排名。該框架、所有收集的信號、評分輸出和評估工具均以 CC BY 4.0 授權發布。
2604.24038.author: Yuxuan Gao et.al.
2604.24038.authors: Yuxuan Gao, Megan Wang, Yi Ling Yu
